evidence: The paper tested Random Forest for predictive performance but explicitly used SHAP analysis ("Shapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) for explanatory analysis") on LightGBM for feature importance, not impurity-based importance. Logistic regression (odds ratios with p-values testing coefficients) corroborated rankings: "the two methods showed high consistency in feature ranking and directionality." Feature importance rankings are secondary; the main conclusions address predictive model performance (AUC 0.928, sensitivity 0.809 for LightGBM at 90% specificity).
